creator: dag-erli@ifi.uio.no
text:
ted@wiz.plymouth.edu writes:
> There is a new revision to the 3c905 ethernet card that is undetected,
> it is a "B" revision according to the vendor supplied setup program.

Please search the archives before submitting a PR. This is not simply
a matter of detection; a whole new driver must be written.

DES

Dag-Erling Smørgrav - dag-erli@ifi.uio.no
